title: Etseinri HDMI 2.1 Cable 2M Certified 48Gbps Ultra High Speed HDMI® Cable 1440P@240/165/144/120Hz 10K 8K 4K HDMI Lead Braided Cord HDCP 2.2 Dolby Atmos Vision eARC HDR for Gaming Monitors TV Soundbar
features: Latest Certified 8K HDMI Cable 2m: The Etseinri Ultra High Speed HDMI 2.1 Cable stands as the Newest HDMI Version worldwide, offering substantially upgraded capabilities that outperform its 4K HDMI counterpart in every aspect. This HDMI 2.1 Cord 2m delivers bandwidth up to 48Gbps and fits 10K, 8K 60Hz, 4K 240Hz, 4K 165Hz, 4K 144Hz, 4K 120Hz, 4K 60Hz, 2K 1440p 144Hz and 1080P 240Hz. The 8K HDMI 2.1 Lead 2m delivers ultra-sharp visuals with enhanced resolution and ultra-high refresh rates, while maintaining seamless backward compatibility with all prior HDMI versions, including 2.0b, 2.0a, 1.4, 1.3, 1.2, and 1.1.

8K HDMI 2.1 Cable, Crafted for Ultimate Gaming:Etseinri Ultra High Speed HDMI Cable 2.1 supports Dynamic HDR10+, D-olby Vision, 48-Bit Deep Color, unlocking video’s full potential with richer depth, sharper detail, vibrant brightness, striking contrast, and expansive color ranges. The HDMI Cable for Gaming elevates gameplay with VRR (Variable Refresh Rate), QMS (Quick Media Switching), QFT (Quick Frame Transport), and ALLM (Auto Low Latency Mode), dynamically syncing frame rates to match in-game action for seamless, tear-free visuals.

8K HDMI eARC Cable for Dynamic Audio Mastery：Etseinri Black 8K HDMI to HDMI Cable(Version 2.1) elevates your audio experience with enhanced eARC functionality, simplifying connections between your TV and soundbar/AV receiver while dramatically expanding bandwidth to support uncompressed, lossless surround sound. Enjoy crystal-clear audio formats including DTS:X, DTS Master, D-olby TrueHD, and D-olby Atmos 3D Surround Sound, this HDMI 2.1 eARC Soundbar Cable delivering richer bass, precise spatial audio, and cinematic immersion. This HDMI Male to Male 2.1 eARC Cable ensures every note, dialogue, and dynamic sound effect is reproduced with unparalleled clarity and depth.

Universal Compatibility & Seamless Integration: Etseinri Certified 8K HDMI Cable 2.1 delivers plug-and-play compatibility with devices featuring standard HDMI 2.1/2.0/1.4/1.3 ports, including PS5/PS4/PS3 , X-box Series X/S/One/360, Nin-tendo Switch (OLED/V2/Original Dock), Laptops, PCs (Desktop & All-in-One), Mac-Book/i-Mac, GPUs (N-VIDIA/AMD), Capture Cards, Streaming Devices (F-ire TV/SHIELD TV/Ro-ku), Blu-ray Players, DVD Players, AV Receivers, Soundbars (eARC-enabled), Gaming Monitors (8K/4K@240Hz/144Hz/120Hz), HDTVs, Projectors, and High-Fidelity Speakers.

Built to Last with Uncompromising Durability & Signal Integrity: Etseinri 4K 240Hz HDMI Cable features a reinforced braided nylon jacket that tightly encases the interior PVC insulation. Paired with a 24K gold-plated connector, this HDMI Cable with Ethernet ensures long-lasting durability and corrosion resistance. Inside, oxygen-free copper (OFC) conductors and 4-layer shielding deliver exceptional signal protection, minimizing interference and ensuring crystal-clear 8K video and lossless audio. Whether bent, twisted, or used daily, this HDMI HDCP 2.2/2.3 Cable resists wear and tear, making it ideal for gaming, streaming, and professional setups.
